steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The prompt explicitly states the student wants to “indicate the size” of the Pilot Knob NWR. The notes provide this information: “It encompasses 90 acres.”

steps.title: Match the goal to the choice
steps.content: Choice D accomplishes the goal by including the specific measurement: the refuge “encompasses 90 acres of land in Missouri.” Choices A, B, and C omit the acreage figure, focusing instead on management, habitat, or location. That matches choice D — D is correct.
